query:
INSERT INTO players (userId, deviceId, name, email, type, isPremium, totalPuzzles, totalCorrect, totalTimeMs, completedCycles, accuracy, rating, lastActivityAt)
SELECT 
  750572, NULL, 'Ismail', 'happychesspenguin@gmail.com', 'registered', 0,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId = 750572),
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pa.isCorrect), 0) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId = 750572),
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pa.timeMs), 0) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId = 750572),
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history WHERE userId = 750572),
  CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId = 750572) = 0 THEN 0
    ELSE ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pa.isCorrect), 0) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId = 750572) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId = 750572) * 100)
  END,
  1200,
  NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM players WHERE userId = 750572);

  CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId = 750572) = 0 THEN 0
